case_title: AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. EVANS, YVONNE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SERVED JAN-30-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $4.03 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 637 LAGUNA ST. #2, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, ORDER STAYED UNTIL OCT-21-1993
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF FEB-10-1993 SET ASIDE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE
